candidate_policy.if_latest_selection_differs: ROTATED; do not approve this request; PM must regenerate candidate-aligned no-authority chain

allowed: review Bybit/API/policy compatibility of a later same-window bounded Demo final gate
review NEARUSDT Demo market/order-shape constraints implied by post_only_near_touch_or_skip
review whether max 2 probe intents, max 954.46746768 USDT per order, post-only maker-side near-touch-or-skip, and skip-on-gap-greater-than-75bps are acceptable for a future Demo-only bounded probe
approve or reject proceeding to a separate same-window final gate request
forbidden_in_this_bb_review: new public Bybit market data call
setting bounded-probe operator authorization decision to authorize
Cost Gate lowering or global threshold mutation

future_final_window_constraints_if_bb_ap: PM must recheck source/runtime heads, Linux cleanliness, latest candidate selection, all artifact sha256s, and standing auth freshness in the same invocation window
PM must open or produce the final-window gate before any Bybit public/private call, Decision Lease, order, or probe
any final-window exchange-facing action must preserve Guardian/Decision Lease/Rust authority path
skip and record touchability block if touch gap > 75bps
operator authorization must remain defer unless a later exact authorization scope approves otherwise
first-attempt bootstrap is not proof and cannot be promoted as PnL evidence

rejection_to_work_item_mapping.candidate_rotated: ROTATED; regenerate dynamic candidate chain from latest machine-readable artifacts
rejection_to_work_item_mapping.bybit_policy_rejects_order_shape: repair placement plan or reduce scope to non-exchange-facing review
rejection_to_work_item_mapping.risk_limits_too_broad: tighten max notional/probe count and rerun E3/BB request
rejection_to_work_item_mapping.artifact_stale: rerun no-order readiness chain and rebuild BB request
